data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: AC self-check ✓ — (1) No -t flag syntax remains; all ticket creates use positional type; (2) --acceptance flag removed/replaced with ticket comment workflow; (3) -p shorthand replaced with --priority=; (4) --description flag removed from preplanning story creation; (5) CLAUDE.md Quick Reference already consistent; (6) ruff check passes
